title: Read existing event.bus/context.bus for visualization snapshots
summary: Adds an importable adapter that attaches to the already-created EventBus and existing context snapshot source, then projects observable facts to a stable VisPy/browser-ready snapshot.
tests: PYTHONPATH=src:. python -m compileall -q src tests tools
notes: Does not create a parallel bus.
Does not add CLI, daemon, service, watcher, Scheduler modification, Qdrant, LLM, OpenVINO, network path, VisPy dependency, or browser launch.
